parsed_output.justification: Tyler claims to be the Seer and identifies Clint as the Werewolf. Erin (claiming to be the Robber) and Margaret (claiming to be the Troublemaker) eventually agree with Tyler's assessment. Clint claims he was the Drunk, which means he could have swapped his starting card for a Werewolf card from the center, and he admits he could very well be the Werewolf.
